TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Naihunpu = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Sinyisyang ka alang Naihunpu. 656 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,803 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 32% niqan 575 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 68% niqan 1,228 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun30%, Paiwan 1%, Tayal 0.5%, Amis 0.5%.
S.PHON: = naiħunpu = gaga mniq nantowsən sinjisjaŋ ka alaŋ naiħunpu. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun**%, paiwan *%, tajal *.*%, amis *.*%.
S.FORM: = Naihunpu = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Sinyisyang ka alang Naihunpu. 656 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,803 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 32% niqan 575 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 68% niqan 1,228 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun30%, Paiwan 1%, Tayal 0.5%, Amis 0.5%.
S.PHON: = naiħunpu = gaga mniq nantowsən sinjisjaŋ ka alaŋ naiħunpu. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun**%, paiwan *%, tajal *.*%, amis *.*%.
